data.body: Same failure pattern observed with dso:debug-everything in session worktree-20260409-173013: Skill(dso:debug-everything) invoked twice (both returned 'Successfully loaded skill'), then the orchestrator read SKILL.md directly via Read tool and proceeded to execute the skill inline. The Skill tool result is not being consumed as the execution context in either case — the orchestrator treats the Skill invocation as a loading step and then reaches for the file directly.
